svg.title: Official Control Surface vs Project Workflow Harness
svg.desc: A layered diagram showing official Codex surfaces, Codex execution, the project workflow harness adapter, and repository truth, with a side boundary between OpenAI-owned product surface and repository-owned workflow rules.

text.font-family: ui-monospace, SFMono-Regular, Menlo, Monaco, Consolas, monospace

svg.text: Codex Mobile improves how I reach Codex. The repository harness preserves how my project should be continued.
